summary: Automated tracking issue created by GitHub Agentic Workflows to record no-op runs from CI/CD agentic workflow executions in the repository.

reproEvidence.environmentDetails: Automated GitHub Actions bot issue; not a user-reported bug. Two bot comments recorded: 'Update Release Notes' no-op (2026-04-28) and 'Weekly Sample Scout Report' analysis (2026-04-29).

repoLinks.description: Workflow run: Weekly Sample Scout Report

analysis.summary: Issue #3795 is an automatically managed tracking issue created by the GitHub Agentic Workflows bot. It serves as a sink for no-op notifications from agentic CI workflows and is explicitly marked 'Do not close this issue manually' by the bot. This is not a user-reported bug or feature request.
analysis.rationale: The issue is auto-created by github-actions[bot] with boilerplate content explaining no-op run aggregation. It has the 'agentic-workflows' label and carries a 'Do not assign to an agent' directive in its body. Type/enhancement fits best as it represents infrastructure tooling, with area/Build for CI automation. No code investigation is needed — this is a workflow infrastructure artifact, not a SkiaSharp API issue.

codeInvestigation.finding: Repository contains agentic workflow agent definitions. The no-op tracking issue is an automatically managed artifact of this infrastructure.

keySignals.text: This issue is automatically managed by GitHub Agentic Workflows. Do not close this issue manually.
keySignals.interpretation: Explicitly marked as auto-managed infra — should not be triaged as a user issue.

keySignals.text: No action to take - Do not assign to an agent.
keySignals.interpretation: Bot explicitly requests this issue not be assigned for action.
Not a human reporter — automated CI artifact.

actionability.reason: This is an automatically managed tracking issue that must remain open. The bot explicitly states 'Do not close this issue manually'. No user action required.

actions.description: Apply type/enhancement and area/Build labels to classify the automated tracking issue
